title: Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple is located at Vyttila village in Ernakulam district.
overview.description: Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple is located at Vyttila village in Ernakulam district. The temple has two main deities, Sri Parameswara and Maha Vishnu. Deities having separate temple complex; Lord Sri Parameswara in the form of Sri Rudra and Maha Vishnu in the form of Vaikundeswara. Both deities are facing east.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nettoor
topPlaces.description: Nettoor (also spelled as Nettur aka Tirunettur) is a region in the city of Kochi. It is around 5 km (3.1 mi) from Vytilla Junction and around 8 km (5.0 mi) from Ernakulam Junction Railway Station.

topPlaces.name: Thevara
topPlaces.description: Thevara is a ward of Kochi, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Forum Mall Kochi
topPlaces.description: Forum Kochi is a premium shopping mall located in Maradu, Kochi, Kerala, India. The mall is promoted by Prestige Group, one of India's largest real estate developers and Thomsun Group, a Dubai-headquartered diversified conglomerate, with a strong presence across GCC and the Indian subcontinent.

topPlaces.name: Edakochi
topPlaces.description: Edakochi is a region in southern Kochi, India. It borders Palluruthy to the northwest and is separated from Aroor to the south and Kumbalam to the east by the Kerala backwaters.

topPlaces.name: Abad Nucleus Mall
topPlaces.description: Nucleus Mall is a mall in Kochi, Kerala and is located in the suburb of Maradu, near Thripunithura and around 8 km (5.0 mi) from the city centre. The mall is constructed and managed by ABAD Builders, a prominent builder of villas and apartments based in Kochi.

topPlaces.name: Kochukadavanthra
topPlaces.description: Kochukadavanthra is a small area of Elamkulam village in the city of Kochi, situated on the west bank of the Perandoor Canal. It is of close proximity to Kadavanthra, Chilavannoor & Vyttila.

topPlaces.name: Chilavannoor
topPlaces.description: Chilavannoor, or Chilavannur, is a high-value residential area of Kochi in the state of Kerala, India. Chilavannoor Road serves as its main artery, running from the Elamkulam junction and is 3 km in length.

topPlaces.name: Poonithura
topPlaces.description: Poonithura is a ward of Kochi, Kerala. It features one of the popular temples in Ernakulam, the Poonithura Sree Krishna Swamy Temple, which is the "Moolasthanam" (original place) of Lord Sree Poornathrayeesa, the national deity of the erstwhile Kingdom of Kochi and the guardian of Tripunithura.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirunettur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nettoor, Thevara, Forum Mall Kochi, Edakochi, Abad Nucleus Mall.
